entries.title: Clouted wants to take the guesswork out of making short videos go viral
entries.description: The video clipping startup raised a $7 million seed round led by Slow Ventures.

entries.title: xAI burned $6.4B last year — SpaceX’s IPO filing shows why the spending is far from over
entries.description: SpaceX's IPO filing reveals xAI lost $6.4 billion in 2025 while planning a massive Grok expansion — offering the first public look at Elon Musk's AI financials and more details about his ambitions.

entries.title: Spotify and Universal Music strike deal allowing fan-made AI covers and remixes
entries.description: Spotify is partnering with  Universal Music Group￼ to let Premium subscribers create AI-generated song covers and remixes, with participating artists receiving a share of the revenue.

entries.title: Six search engines worth trying now that Google isn’t really Google anymore
entries.description: Google is about to look really different, and if you're not a fan of the AI overview feature, then you're not going to like what's coming.

entries.title: Trump delays AI security executive order, saying language ‘could have been a blocker’
entries.description: President Trump delayed signing an executive order that would have required pre-release government security reviews of AI models, citing dissatisfaction with the order's language.

entries.title: Spotify adds AI-powered Q&A and briefing generation features to podcasts
entries.description: Spotify will let you generate daily or weekly briefs based on your prompts

entries.title: Spotify takes on Google’s NotebookLM with its new app
entries.description: Spotify is releasing the new desktop app as a research preview in more than 20 markets.

entries.title: Spotify launches an ElevenLabs-powered audiobook creation tool
entries.description: The AI-powered audiobook generation won't bind authors to an exclusive contract, meaning they are free to publish their generated audiobooks anywhere.

entries.title: The Path, founded by Tony Robbins and Calm alums, hopes to offer safer AI therapy
entries.description: The Path says its AI model has scored 95 on the mental health safety AI benchmark, Vera-MH. This compares to a top score of 65 for the consumer bots.

entries.title: Hark raises $700M Series A for its secretive ‘universal’ AI interface
entries.description: Hark expects to release its first multimodal models this summer, which it says will power a personal AI platform that works with existing products and services. The company expects to follow that with

entries.title: Google is pitching an AI agent ecosystem to consumers who may not buy it
entries.description: One of the most promising introductions at Google’s I/O developer conference on Tuesday was a new way for consumers to use the web: AI agents. Unfortunately, it was also the most confusing.

entries.title: With aluminum prices up 20%, recycling startups bet on AI to cash in
entries.description: Recycling startups are using AI to improve the recovery of critical minerals like aluminum, aiming to build a massive source of the metal.

entries.title: Jensen Huang says he’s found a ‘brand new’ $200B market for Nvidia
entries.description: The next big thing for Nvidia will be CPUs for AI agents, $200 billion worth, CEO Jensen Huang predicts.

entries.title: Anthropic says it’s about to have its first profitable quarter
entries.description: Anthropic has told its investors that it will more than double revenue to around $10.9 billion in its second quarter.

entries.title: Google goes for the glitter with disco-ball icons: ‘Are y’all sure you still want this?’
entries.description: You can now disco ball-ify your entire Pixel homescreen, says Google.

entries.title: How VCs and founders use inflated ‘ARR’ to crown AI startups
entries.description: Some AI startups are stretching traditional revenue metrics when talking about progress publicly. And their investors are fully aware.

entries.title: Elon Musk can’t hear you over the sound of his $1.75 trillion IPO
entries.description: The SpaceX S-1 is finally here, and the story it tells goes way further than rockets. The filing runs to 36 pages of risk factors alone, and the numbers inside match the ambition: a $28 trillion total

entries.title: You can no longer Google the word ‘disregard’
entries.description: After Google Search's AI update, the word "disregard" now effectively breaks the search interface.

entries.title: We tried Google’s AI glasses and they’re almost there
entries.description: Google demoed prototype Android XR glasses that overlay Gemini-powered translation, navigation, and other information directly into your field of view.

entries.title: SpaceX files to go public, and the math requires a little faith
